name: Pineapple Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chocolate chip or gingersnap cookie crumbs
1 package (3-1/2 oz) instant vanilla pudding mix
1 can (20 oz) Dole pineapple slices, in unsweetened pineapple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cookie crumbs with butter. Press into a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Bake at 400 degree oven for 5 minutes.
3. Beat together pudding mix, yogurt, cream cheese, orange juice and 2 teaspoons orange peel (mixture is stiff).
4. Turn mixture into crust. Chill.
5. Drain pineapple, reserve 1/2 cup juice.
6. Combine juice, sugar and cornstarch. Cook, stirring until boils and thickens.
7. Cool. Stir in remaining orange peel.
8. Arrange pineapple over top of pie. Spoon sauce over pineapple.
9. Serves 6.
